title: OboRin Comet Cluster
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Obo}} {{CelestialBody |image=[[File:Coruscant_system_TUF.jpg]] |name=OboRin Comet Cluster |region=*[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Northern Dependencies/Legends|Northern Dependencies]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *[[The Slice/Legends|The Slice]] **[[Arrowhead]] |sector=*[[Corusca sector/Legends|Corusca sector]] **[[Coruscant sector/Legends|Coruscant sector]] |system=[[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]]''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' |coordinates=L-9 |xyz=0, 0, 0 |distance= |suns=1: [[Coruscant Prime/Legends|Coruscant Prime]] |orbited= |position=13 |moons= |routes=*[[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] *[[Coruscant–Dantooine hyperlane]] *[[Koros Trunk Line/Legends|Koros Trunk Line]] *[[Leisure Corridor]]''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]'' *[[Martial Cross]] *[[Metellos Trade Route/Legends|Metellos Trade Route]] *[[Namadii Corridor/Legends|Namadii Corridor]] *[[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] *[[Shawken Spur]] |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=[[Comet/Legends|Comet]] cluster |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|And there are uncharted asteroids orbiting with the OboRins?''"
"''We're keeping an eye on them. We can take them out anytime.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Kenth Hamner]]|''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''}} The '''OboRin Comet Cluster''', also known as the '''OboRins''', was a [[Comet/Legends|comet]] cluster on the edge of the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]]. ==History== {{Quote|Luke, the Yuuzhan Vong are already pushing through the comet cluster. Rather than fire through the refugee screen, Traest is falling back and trying to maneuver. Garm will have to join him soon or be cut off, and Wedge is two minutes behind schedule because the battle is moving toward Coruscant.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]], to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|}} The [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yuuzhan Vong fleet|warfleet]] arrived in the OboRin Comet Cluster after their [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; First)|conquest]] of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]]. This arrival marked the beginning of the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Fall of Coruscant]]. {{Comet-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030403coruscant|text=Coruscant: Center of the Empire|int=Coruscant: Center of the Empire}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Cúmulo de Cometas OboRin |pl=Obo Rin }} [[Category:Comets]] [[Category:Coruscant system locations]]
